name: proxvanta
description: Use your team's Agent Contexts and backlog context through the ProxVanta MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Agentify product execution across code, backlog, and design.
interface.longDescription: Connect ProxVanta in Cursor so teams can load Agent Contexts into a thread, inspect setup readiness, and route one-shot work through product-aware MCP tools. ProxVanta uses the hosted MCP endpoint and your organization API key.
defaultPrompt: use ProxVanta to list the available Agent Contexts.
use ProxVanta designer to review this flow.
use ProxVanta to route this feature context through the right Agent Contexts.
